74236.body:
Access SPCXx xStocks before they hit Kraken.

Kraken logo 
( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/OAJMt-GJBA84l8_Yiry2KA~~/AAQRxRA~/VXjyAE76xxqzJK-Vfu2WZPUFGrNPKRXhIOWnzSaXfOihgIkq3msH8SjnEoBS_LM3EBmbAIInA820iqoBxwtsu8KW7xAkeHo9HAuH7FhKWhxfeaizeM-dX88hUd1pCJYqzZOMnMy0fLeSSXgLG5Ca_Q~~ )

**************************************
DonвАЩt want to wait for SpaceX to list?
**************************************

Kraken gives you access to the IPO

( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/AtqwibNlqQGpht7gFhgARw~~/AAQRxRA~/yraxOJR7CcLQDv__JIdy3gNqsAnzD7ysRAkDwrRQ0GtgDHfM1CD0CG5QHFd2xB5fotfuNTlR7pAsnt3slRpAcRnEg2pKxTiLt8CoilInswCtAYep0WbohclbtkOdLXLS88Iaey7JOo67aIsF935KjaCjzz6YsQeoxEYUYz10KfU~ )
Submit interest in the SpaceX IPO xStocks before trading on the
open market begins.

If allocated, youвАЩll receive xStocks on launch day, giving you
access to SpaceX from the very start.

IвАЩm interested  
( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/u3Y35VOtxADAJfiH2NbNfQ~~/AAQRxRA~/yraxOJR7CcLQDv__JIdy3gNqsAnzD7ysRAkDwrRQ0GtgDHfM1CD0CG5QHFd2xB5faHSc51yS1ZdMxwioyzwWZub43zLZORBdP4KhtOdn2AQK9fcrzX5nAWVUBCkpJMfme05hyFHkH0sM5Za1NNusUpffcBoHTGnLLM8jqfaxIjQ~ )

--------------------
HereвАЩs how it works:
--------------------

* Submit interest for SpaceX xStocks
* Funds are reserved. Anything not filled is refunded
automatically
* Cancel anytime before the window closes
* Any allocation received is live in your portfolio on listing
day
Allocation is decided by the IPO broker based on demand. High
demand may result in a full, partial, or no allocation.

Sign in 
( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/WYZ5SVlXbZmT8ngcNoXPdA~~/AAQRxRA~/VXjyAE76xxqzJK-Vfu2WZPUFGrNPKRXhIOWnzSaXfOihgIkq3msH8SjnEoBS_LM3_Vu7aVBn7EM3WE_b2UjSXe2kwY0pgW7PhmB-iJA04V0IVboBli7Hn3GuoPHgrXkZ997JIuRi0q8MasssGarrBA~~ ) вАҐ Get

kraken.com ( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/JxgA624iBwY4PW0G_7MOjA~~/AAQRxRA~/tDfnCgSvPit1tVOC9fcMhZaQRt9PSwfGhLxMBZhWDkHm8I0IygvOfd3u7KfSIZzMHfQ9q8bR-DjEMC5tDuwuNcIuew2UaXZRrfKg-fgeJjJ1HVS3LJHK3X37lrDGO09v )  Kraken

74235.subject: The Nerdy Escorts Cashing In On Silicon ValleyвАЩs AI Boom
74235.body:
Forbes P.M.

–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Forbes


–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Forbes

    
    
    –Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞–є—В–µ —Ж—О —Б—В–∞—В—В—О –љ–∞ LinkedIn, —Й–Њ–± –њ—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
–Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞—В–Є –љ–∞ LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/nerdy-escorts-cashing-silicon-valleys-ai-boom-forbes-magazine-l0qoc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSxhlHp%2F0Q%2FuDbMsl8cQlPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3CtEOassm9WYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq5prife~st-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq5prife-st
  
Good evening, 2024 college grad Meida Marek (her online pseudonym) realized AI could soon replace her professional skills. Intelligent and talkative with interests in topics like AI, biohacking and cryptocurrency, she decided to turn that toolkit into a new careerвАФand became an escort. Her specialty is high-end companionship for Silicon ValleyвАЩs most online, most technical clients. HereвАЩs why the few women specializing in this are having so much success. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Getty Images What To Know About TrumpвАЩs Expected Appearance At TonightвАЩs Knicks Game TrumpвАЩs anticipated arrival has heightened security measures so much that ticket holders are asked to arrive two hours early. Joe Raedle via Getty Images How Much Graham Platner, MaineвАЩs Oyster-Farming Senate Candidate, Is Worth The veteran running a tear-down-the-oligarchy campaign leverages his rural upbringing, but the full story of his net worth is complicated.
–Я—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/nerdy-escorts-cashing-silicon-valleys-ai-boom-forbes-magazine-l0qoc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSxhlHp%2F0Q%2FuDbMsl8cQlPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3CtEOassm9WYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mq5prife~st-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq5prife-st

My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
–Ф—Ц–Ј–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П, —З–Њ–Љ—Г –Љ–Є –≤–Ї–ї—О—З–Є–ї–Є —Ж—О —Ц–љ—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—Ж—Ц—О https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=uk&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSxhlHp%2F0Q%2FuDbMsl8cQlPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3CtEOassm9WYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer-null-fz96fz~mq5prife~st-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq5prife-st

74234.subject: Strategy and BitMine Double Down
74234.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b)**[ buys 1,550 BTC for $101M one week after selling 32](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b)

* **[BitMine](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low)**[ buys 126,971 ETH for $207M, largest weekly buy of 2026](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low)

* **[Arthur Hayes](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/arthur-hayes-dumps-worldcoin-days-after-maelstrom-pitched-ai-ipo-trade)**[ dumps Worldcoin days after pitching its AI-IPO trade](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/arthur-hayes-dumps-worldcoin-days-after-maelstrom-pitched-ai-ipo-trade)

* **[Bybit and Kraken](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-kraken-xstocks-spacex-tokenized-equity-pre-ipo-derivatives-four-venues)**[ add xStocks SpaceX as pre-IPO race reaches four venues](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-kraken-xstocks-spacex-tokenized-equity-pre-ipo-derivatives-four-venues)

* **[200+ crypto firms](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/200-crypto-firms-urge-senate-vote-clarity-act-galaxy-cuts-passage-odds-60-percent)**[ urge CLARITY Senate vote as Galaxy cuts odds to 60%](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/200-crypto-firms-urge-senate-vote-clarity-act-galaxy-cuts-passage-odds-60-percent)

**[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b)** bought [1,550 bitcoin for $101.3 million between June 1 and 7](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b), 50 times the 32 BTC the company sold one week earlier, and pushed its cash reserve to $1 billion. The same Monday, **[BitMine Immersion](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low)** disclosed its [largest weekly purchase of 2026](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low): 126,971 ETH for $207 million at a $1,630 average, deploying the proceeds of last Thursday's [$300 million STRC-style preferred-stock filing](https://thedefiant.io/newsletter/bitmine-brings-strategy-s-strc-playbook-to-an-eth-treasury). The buy lifts BitMine's treasury to 5.54 million ETH, 4.59% of the circulating supply. Both purchases were funded with capital raised in the prior weeks through instruments designed for exactly this trade: issue paper at one price, deploy it at a lower one.

Across the trade, **[Arthur Hayes](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/arthur-hayes-dumps-worldcoin-days-after-maelstrom-pitched-ai-ipo-trade)** sold his entire Worldcoin position on June 6, completing a weeks-long liquidation across HYPE, NEAR, ZEC, and now WLD вАФ [three days after Maelstrom publicly pitched Worldcoin](https://thed

74230.body:

Happy Monday good frogs! Start of another big week!

(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Important update regarding our friends at @Balancer [ https://substack.com/redirect/abc01fb8-a7b4-4eb0-9b3a-8d135642554c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] - who just introduced an extremely cool new development called AutoRange Pools!
As explained in their recent thread [ https://substack.com/redirect/e9269d45-7c3d-4029-8ad2-cacb623e2106?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]:
вАЬAutoRange Pools are live on Balancer...  
Concentrated liquidity with a range that readjusts on its own, a fungible LP position, and no oracle in the loopвА¶вАЭ
The gigabrain nature of this development has substantial benefits for DAOвАЩs and treasuries, passive LPвАЩs, protocols, and more!
As the thread continues:
вАЬThe same design that makes positions portable keeps the protocol trustless. 
Price comes from the poolвАЩs own trading activity, not an external feed. 
For protocols, that removes an entire attack vector: no feed to manipulate and no oracle in the critical pathвА¶вАЭ
Learn more in this great article from BalancerвАЩs @tiagohansen_eth [ https://substack.com/redirect/861093bb-a36c-4fde-a14a-b75fd3183c0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] (see screenshot of first two paragraphs below!)вА¶
And as always make sure to follow Balancer on Twitter [ https://substack.com/redirect/abc01fb8-a7b4-4eb0-9b3a-8d135642554c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates, and stay tuned as we keep offering updates on everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are quite green today. Best-performing top 50 chain on the monthly is Mezo (#50) at +323%. 
Protocols are mostly green today. Best-performing top 50 protocol on the monthly is Sablier (#4) at +40.01%.
